topStories.description: Speaking to Al Jazeera, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said, "I receive messages from Witkoff directly, as before, and this does not mean that we are in negotiations."

topStories.description: The Trump administration's proposed rule allows 401(k) plans to include private equity and cryptocurrencies. While industry leaders praise potential benefits for retirement savings, concerns about fees, complexity, and liquidity for retail investors remain.

dailyNews.description: The Daily Show host Jon Stewart has criticised US President Donald Trump’s recent public conduct, comparing it to an unfiltered elderly relative rather than a wartime leader. His remarks come amid scrutiny of Trump’s messaging and leadership during an ongoing crisis.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day on positive thinking by Norman Vincent Peale: ‘Change your thoughts and you change your world’
dailyNews.description: This quote is personal. It tells us that we may not be able to control everything that happens around us, but we can control how we think about it. That is where it all starts.

Meanwhile, diesel prices crossed $5 per gallon mark on March 17 with the current rates over 40% higher than they were before the conflict - reports state

dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is considering a global summit to counter Antifa and left-wing extremist networks, saying they pose a transnational terror threat.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Tiger Woods 'lives a life of pain' after DUI arrest as affidavit reveals pills found
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says Tiger Woods "lives a life of pain" after the golfer's DUI arrest in Jupiter Island, adding that the golfer "doesn’t have an alcohol problem."

dailyNews.title: As Americans bear costs of the Iran war and DHS shutdown, Washington politicians leave town
dailyNews.description: Congress left for recess without resolving the shutdown, and Trump still regularly goes to Palm Beach and says he won't give up golfing during wartime.
